nodes.description: PWA Android Chrome icon at 192x192px. Circular design featuring two green leaves rising upward from the center (bright green ~#3aaa35 and darker green ~#2d8a28), flanked by curved green arc strokes on left and right sides, set above a blue water/wave shape split into dark navy blue (~#2c4fa3) and lighter sky blue (~#4a90d9). White background. Represents nature, growth, and water â€” consistent with an environmental/sustainability brand identity.
nodes.icon_purpose: PWA Android Chrome home screen icon
nodes.motif: two leaves with arc strokes above a blue wave/water shape

nodes.label: PWA Icon Set â€“ Oasis of Change
nodes.description: The complete set of Progressive Web App (PWA) and browser icons for the Oasis of Change website, including Android Chrome icons (192x192, 512x512), Apple Touch Icon (180x180), and standard favicons (16x16, 32x32). All icons share the same circular green-and-blue logo design.
